description: Our laboratory pursues advanced research across the entire LiDAR ecosystem, bridging fundamental physics-informed models with national-scale deployment, autonomous vehicle perception, and deep learning.

focus_areas.title: Autonomous Systems & Simulation
focus_areas.description: Developing platforms like SimDaaS for autonomous vehicle testing. This includes advanced simulation frameworks utilizing physics-informed learning to significantly reduce the sim-to-real gap for LiDAR data simulation and testing.

focus_areas.title: Deep Learning & Point Clouds
focus_areas.description: Designing advanced 3D CNN architectures for semantic segmentation. We focus on enhancing supervised learning to process complex terrestrial, aerial, and mobile scanning data for feature extraction.

focus_areas.title: Precision Forestry & Hydrology
focus_areas.description: Applying LiDAR technology for high-resolution forest characterization, individual tree morphology, species identification, and the precise localization of micro-rainwater harvesting structures.

focus_areas.title: Digital Twins & Smart Mobility
focus_areas.description: Generating high-resolution 3D models and leading initiatives in digital twin benchmarking. We leverage techniques like 3D Gaussian Splatting for neural scene reconstruction and urban informatics.

focus_areas.title: UAVs & Cooperative Localization
focus_areas.description: Researching the cooperative localization of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles using low-cost GNSS/MEMS sensors and developing robust UAV Traffic Management (UTM) systems for Indian airspace.

focus_areas.title: Technology Transfer & Startups
focus_areas.description: Translating lab research directly to the national market by incubating companies like Geokno (India's first LiDAR company) and SimDaaS Autonomy.

research_groups.name: Machine Intelligence & Autonomous Perception
research_groups.description: Focused on physics-aware neural architectures, multi-sensor fusion (camera, LiDAR, radar), and developing robust perception models that bridge simulation environments with real-world complexities.

research_groups.name: Geospatial AI & Remote Sensing
research_groups.description: Dedicated to deep learning applications for Earth observation, spanning transmission line extraction, tree species identification, and urban feature segmentation from multi-modal sensor fusion.

research_groups.name: Advanced Topographic Mapping
research_groups.description: Developing methodologies for airborne laser scanning (ALS) and mobile laser scanning (MLS) data acquisition, flight planning optimization, quality control, and developing national BIS standards.

research_groups.name: Smart Infrastructure & Heritage
research_groups.description: Leveraging terrestrial laser scanning for national-scale infrastructure projects, disaster management mapping, and the digital preservation and 3D documentation of archaeological heritage sites.
